facebook.caption: 4.7 stars. 270 reviews. And it sits right on Bãi Dài, one of the longest stretches of beach on the island. Vinpearl Phú Quốc is not a quiet secret. It's a resort that keeps delivering. Private beach access, full resort amenities, and that north-island calm that the south never has. If you're planning Phu Quoc and want the full package, this is the benchmark. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.

items.placeName: Into The Blue - Phu Quoc Snorkeling Boat Trip

facebook.caption: 530 reviews. Every single one, 5 stars. Into The Blue on Đường Trần Hưng Đạo isn't playing around. Phu Quoc's waters are already some of the clearest in Southeast Asia. This boat trip puts you directly in them. Coral, fish, open ocean. No fluff, no tourist trap energy. Just the reef doing its thing. Book early, this one sells out fast for a reason. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Jumping off the boat into Phu Quoc's reef. Into The Blue has 530 reviews and a perfect 5.0. Watch what you actually see underwater. Tag your travel buddy.
